requirements.summary: Make the 'Add Comment' button in CommentHistorySection functional to allow users to add new comments with PTP status selection that appear in the timeline
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the 'Add Comment' button reveals a comment input form (text area + PTP status selector).
The user can type a comment and select a PTP status from the available options (ptp_made, ptp_honored, ptp_broken, not_reached, disputed).
Submitting the form appends the new comment to the displayed comment timeline for the current case.
The new comment is color-coded according to the selected PTP status, consistent with the existing color-coding scheme.
The input form can be dismissed/cancelled without submitting.
The 'Add Comment' button is disabled or shows a loading state while submission is in progress.

file_operations.description: Add local state management for new comments and implement an inline comment input form that appears when 'Add Comment' is clicked. The form includes a textarea for comment text and a dropdown/select for PTP status (ptp_made, ptp_honored, ptp_broken, not_reached, disputed). On submit, add the new comment to local state with the current timestamp and selected PTP status. Apply the existing color-coding logic from the color map (green for ptp_made and ptp_honored, red for ptp_broken, gray for not_reached, orange for disputed). Include form validation, cancel/dismiss functionality, and disable the 'Add Comment' button during submission. Follow the existing Comment type structure from frontend/src/data/dummyComments.ts and maintain consistency with the color legend display.
